section_name: United States Department of Transportation Numbers
text:
(a) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B. 3254 ), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2018.

(b) A motor carrier required to register under this subchapter shall maintain an authorized identification number issued to the motor carrier by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration, its successor, or another person authorized to issue the number.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.064 — United States Department of Transportation Numbers

(a) Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B. 3254 ), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2018.

(b) A motor carrier required to register under this subchapter shall maintain an authorized identification number issued to the motor carrier by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration, its successor, or another person authorized to issue the number.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B.3254), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B. 3254 ), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2018.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A motor carrier required to register under this subchapter shall maintain an authorized identification number issued to the motor carrier by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration, its successor, or another person authorized to issue the number.
